aboutSnippet.label: Who We Are
aboutSnippet.title: A Legacy of Excellence Since 1999
aboutSnippet.description: SUCCESS Group is a premier Saudi holding company with over two decades of experience across real estate, technology, contracting, hospitality, trading, and logistics. We are committed to building a diversified, future-ready portfolio aligned with Saudi Vision 2030.

hero.title: About SUCCESS Group
hero.subtitle: Over two decades of building excellence across the Kingdom.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: A Journey of Growth & Impact
story.paragraph1: Founded in 1999, SUCCESS Group began as a contracting firm in Riyadh. Through strategic diversification and a commitment to quality, the group has grown into one of Saudi Arabia's most dynamic holding companies, operating across six key sectors.
story.paragraph2: Today, with 12 specialized subsidiaries and over 1,500 employees, we continue to expand our reach and deepen our impact — contributing meaningfully to Saudi Vision 2030 and the Kingdom's economic transformation.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted and diversified holding group in Saudi Arabia, recognized for excellence, innovation, and meaningful contribution to the nation's economic future.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To build, operate, and invest in world-class businesses that create lasting value for our stakeholders, communities, and the Kingdom at large.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We uphold the highest standards of honesty, transparency, and ethical conduct in every interaction.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace new ideas, technologies, and approaches to stay ahead in a rapidly evolving world.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We believe in the power of partnerships — within our group and with external stakeholders.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We pursue the highest quality in everything we do, from strategy to execution.

hero.label: Careers
hero.title: Build Your Career at SUCCESS
hero.subtitle: Join a team that's shaping the future of Saudi Arabia's economy.

growth.title: Growth & Development
growth.description: Continuous learning programs, mentorship, and clear career progression across our diverse portfolio.

teamwork.title: Collaborative Culture
teamwork.description: Work alongside talented professionals across multiple industries in an environment that values every voice.

impact.title: Meaningful Impact
impact.description: Contribute to nation-building projects that shape communities and drive Saudi Vision 2030 forward.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for inquiries, partnerships, or any questions.
